parameters: Damn, they're organized! Could they be trying to get to the weapon
at the top of the tower!? Shit!
What? You're here to prevent the Magic Cannon from firing?
I don't know who you are, but please, you have to succeed!
Only a handful of people know how to operate the cannon. If word
gets out, we'll have to rethink the future of the tower.
It has a complicated lock that prevents unauthorized access.
Used the Secret Radiant Tower Key!
